name: drive-luxury-wheels
description: Luxury car dealership platform — Next.js frontend + Express API (npm workspaces).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.build:production: npm run prisma:generate -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w frontend" "npm run start -w backend"
